name: Cisco Umbrella
notes:
Cisco Umbrella (aka OpenDNS) is a critical piece of Internet infrastructure providing recursive DNS and cloud-based security services to 80+ million end-users worldwide and 600 billion DNS queries per day. Cisco Umbrella operates a high-speed anycast recursive DNS network and related services.
-- If you have eyeballs/users, we should peer.
-- If you have authoritative DNS servers, we should peer.
